projectDescription: A cross-platform Java desktop application for decoding, monitoring, recording, and streaming trunked mobile radio protocols using Software Defined Radios (SDR).
keyFeatures: Multi-protocol trunked radio decoding (P25, DMR, MPT-1327, LTR, LTR-Net)
Support for popular SDR hardware (RTL-SDR, HackRF, Airspy, SDRPlay RSP series)
Real-time spectral display and waterfall visualization
Audio recording in WAV and MP3 formats
Live audio streaming to Broadcastify, Icecast, OpenMHz, and Shoutcast
Alias management for talkgroups, radio IDs, and identifiers
Polyphase channelizer for simultaneous multi-channel decoding
publicApiSurface: Protocol enum: AM, APCO25, APCO25_PHASE2, DMR, MPT1327, LTR, LTR_NET, DMR, NBFM, MDC1200, PASSPORT
TunerType enum: RTL2832 (E4000, R820T), HackRF ONE/Jawbreaker, Airspy R820T/HF+, SDRPlay RSP1/1A/1B/2/Duo/Dx
BroadcastServerType: Broadcastify, Icecast, OpenMHz, RdioScanner, Shoutcast
PlaylistManager: manages channels, aliases, and broadcast configurations
TunerManager: discovers and controls SDR hardware tuners
AudioStreamingManager: streams audio to remote broadcast servers
ChannelProcessingManager: manages decoding pipeline for each channel
